3137790.name: MESO Demo
3137790.description:
Enter the microcosm

A mysterious alien-esque species invaded your home puddle. The ecosystem is off balance.
Join the tiny microorganism Nunti on its journey through the puddle system's vast expanse. Can you save your home and reconquer the puddle system from the invaders? Can you unravel the mysteries of this microcosmic world and beyond?



Meso, the heart of every puddle, is dying. Find and bring energy to it to save your puddle.

Mysterious invaders block your way, preventing you from getting to Meso. Deadly algae have grown and consumed the energy, and Meso’s energy runs out.
Dodge your enemies, destroy the algae and hurry up! Your time is running out.

Master the movement

MESO offers you a unique, very sensible, floaty movement. Master it and get rewarded with a fast-paced rush through the world of MESO.

This demo includes:
- The beginning of Nunti's journey
- Four levels with four different puddles to explore
- Various tunnels and caves with extra risk reward
- The triangular invaders, your dangerous enemies
- Two levels with the deadly Algae as an additional challenge
- The unique floaty movement, together with the dash ability
3137790.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
